text: Dissecting NotPetya: while the malware shows characteristics similar to ransomware, it is more akin to a wiper, which is generally regarded as malware responsible for destroying data on the target hard disk. NotPetya was not designed to recover files after payment — the ransom screen was a facade concealing its true destructive purpose.
attribution_coding_note: Technical analysis arguing NotPetya 'is more akin to a wiper'; the stored text makes no attribution claim and names no actor.
